name: Flowise With Databases
tagline: Flowise is an open source low-code tool for developers to build customized LLM orchestration flows & AI agents. Also deploys Redis, Postgres and other service
description:
Flowise is an open source low-code tool for developers to build customized LLM orchestration flows & AI agents. Also deploys Redis, Postgres and other service

Docs: https://docs.flowiseai.com/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  flowise:
    image: flowiseai/flowise:latest
    depends_on:
      pg-record-manager:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis-cache:
        condition: service_healthy
      qdrant:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      - DEBUG=${DEBUG:-false}
      - DISABLE_FLOWISE_TELEMETRY=${DISABLE_FLOWISE_TELEMETRY:-true}
      - PORT=${PORT:-3001}
      - DATABASE_PATH=/root/.flowise
      - APIKEY_PATH=/root/.flowise
      - SECRETKEY_PATH=/root/.flowise
      - LOG_PATH=/root/.flowise/logs
      - BLOB_STORAGE_PATH=/root/.flowise/storage
      - FLOWISE_USERNAME=u94d5eb8ca7
      - FLOWISE_PASSWORD=cdd969be61fe7db785a522507bb039dc
    volumes:
      - flowise-data:/root/.flowise
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - wget -qO- http://127.0.0.1:3001 || exit 1
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42036:3001
  pg-record-manager:
    image: postgres:16
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=u69dd2ea6aa
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=5661835e8a1ce7fc2b9ed5ad9a2021b7
      - POSTGRES_DB=${POSTGRES_DB:-pg-record-manager}
    volumes:
      - pg-record-manager-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -h localhost -U $${POSTGRES_USER:-liv65a0e003} -d $${POSTGRES_DB:-flowise_with_databases}
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 20s
    restart: unless-stopped
  redis-cache:
    image: redis:7
    volumes:
      - flowise-redis-cache-data:/data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - redis-cli -h localhost -p 6379 ping
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3
    restart: unless-stopped
  qdrant:
    image: qdrant/qdrant:latest
    environment:
      - QDRANT__SERVICE__API_KEY=257592bf487ede7269b44409d83b8636
    volumes:
      - flowise-qdrant-data:/qdrant/storage
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - bash -c ':> /dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/6333' || exit 1
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  flowise-data: null
  pg-record-manager-data: null
  flowise-redis-cache-data: null
  flowise-qdrant-data: null
